basic_details.job_title: NTPC EET Recruitment 2026 Through GATE 2025 - Apply Online for 52 Engineering Executive Trainee Posts
basic_details.total_vacancies: 27 (Civil/Construction Engineering) + vacancies in Mining Engineering (as per current roster)
basic_details.short_information: NTPC Limited Engineering Executive Trainees Recruitment 2026: Get the latest NTPC Limited recruitment notification 2026 for Engineering Executive Trainees in Civil/Construction Engineering discipline (Advertisement No. 07A/26) and Mining Engineering discipline (Advertisement No. 07B/26) through GATE-2025. The online application process starts on 15th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 29th May 2026. Find NTPC vacancies on the official website www.ntpc.co.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming NTPC Engineering Executive Trainees Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers

application_fee.details: Payment Mode (07B/26 Mining only): State Bank of India has been authorized to collect the fee through a specially opened account. Candidates must approach the nearest SBI branch with the fee payment challan (printed from the portal) for depositing the fee. Alternatively, fee can be paid online through Net Banking / Debit Card / Credit Card. The online payment option will be available in the online application form. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Candidates are therefore requested to verify their eligibility before paying the application fee.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfil all eligibility conditions as on the last date of online application. All qualifications must be from an Indian University/Institute recognized by AICTE/UGC. No mark sheets or provisional certificates will be entertained; all documents must be uploaded in the prescribed format. | Educational Qualification | GATE-2025 Paper as applicable

salary_details.other benefits: Dearness Allowance, other perquisites and allowances, terminal benefits as admissible per company rules from time to time
salary_details.training: Selected candidates will undergo one-year training at various places; first place of posting decided after completion of training
salary_details.posting: Candidates can be placed anywhere in the country in any of NTPC's projects/stations including subsidiaries/JV companies
salary_details.working pattern: Candidates will be required to work in shifts (including night shifts)

selection_process: Shortlisting Based on GATE-2025 score and organisational requirements
Document Verification Original documents to be verified as per prescribed list
Medical Examination By NTPC Medical Board/Officer; decision is final and binding. No relaxation in medical standards. Medical norms available on website.

Eligible candidates who have appeared and qualified in GATE-2025 in the relevant discipline will be shortlisted for document verification based on GATE-2025 performance and organisational requirements. From among the candidates who apply against the advertisement
candidates will be extended an "Offer of Appointment" subject to meeting the advertised eligibility criteria. Only GATE-2025 marks of 2025 will be valid for EET-2026.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online on the website https://careers.ntpc.co.in in the "All Careers" section using their GATE-2025 registration number. No other mode of application will be entertained. Before applying, candidates must ensure they hold a valid GATE-2025 score card and meet all eligibility criteria. The online application system will generate a unique application number which must be noted for future reference. Candidates must upload all required documents in the prescribed format at the time of online application. The GATE-2025 score card, if filled up correctly, will be reflected as appearing in the score card — no request with respect to change in any data entered will be entertained once the application is submitted successfully.
Documents to be uploaded (as listed in the notification):
Class X Passing Certificate or Marksheet for Name/DOB proof
PAN Card & Aadhar Card (Name & DOB should appear in conformity on all documents)
Scanned copy of original GATE-2025 Score Card
Engineering Final Year or Consolidated Marksheet/Transcript clearly indicating percentage of marks in all semesters
Marks conversion formula from University/Institute (for conversion of CGPA/OGPA/DGPA/DSGPA etc. into percentage); conversion formula is not required if marks are already awarded in percentage

Valid Caste/Category Certificate in the prescribed format (for OBC-NCL/EWS/SC/ST candidates); OBC-NCL certificate should be in the current financial year format; EWS Income & Asset Certificate for FY 2026-27 based on income of FY 2025-26
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. Candidates must ensure they fulfil all eligibility criteria and norms mentioned in the advertisement before applying. All qualifications must be from an Indian University/Institute recognized by AICTE/UGC. All computations of age shall be done as on the last date of receipt of online application as mentioned in the advertisement. No change in the Email ID will be allowed once entered; all future correspondence will be sent via Email only. Candidates employed with any organisation are required to submit a relieving letter from the current organisation at the time of joining, if selected for the said posts. A candidate registered and apparently fulfilling the criteria as prescribed in the advertisement would not necessarily be called for document verification — candidature at all stages is provisional. The mere fact that a candidate has submitted an application against the advertisement and apparently fulfils the eligibility criteria shall not bestow on him/her the right to be definitely called for the further selection process. NTPC reserves the right to cancel/restrict/enlarge/modify/alter the recruitment process including the number of vacancies if need so arises, without issuing any further notice and without assigning any reason. Any proceedings in respect of any matter of claim or dispute arising out of this advertisement and/or application in response thereto can be instituted only in New Delhi; courts and tribunals in Delhi only shall have sole and exclusive jurisdiction to any such cause/dispute. In case of any ambiguity arising out of interpretation in versions other than English, the English version will prevail. Go through the medical norms available on the website before applying. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. No manual/paper application will be entertained.

faq.question: Q1. What is the full form of NTPC?
faq.answer: NTPC stands for National Thermal Power Corporation Limited, a Government of India enterprise.

faq.question: Q2. Which posts are available in NTPC EET Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The posts available are Engineering Executive Trainees (EET) – 2025 in Mining Engineering (25 vacancies) and Civil/Construction Engineering (27 vacancies).

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for NTPC EET Mining & Civil posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have B.E./B.Tech in Mining or Civil/Construction Engineering with a valid GATE‑2025 score.

faq.question: Q4. What is the pay scale for NTPC EET posts?
faq.answer: The pay scale for EET (E1 Grade) is Rs. 40,000 – 1,40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are there in NTPC EET Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 25 Mining Engineering vacancies and 27 Civil/Construction Engineering vacancies (Civil includes OBC backlog seats).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application start and last date for NTPC EET Recruitment 2026?
Q7. How can I apply for NTPC EET Mining & Civil posts?
faq.answer: Apply online through the official NTPC careers portal at https://careers.ntpc.co.in using your GATE-2025 registration details.

faq.question: Q8. Is GATE-2025 score mandatory for NTPC EET posts?
faq.answer: Yes, a valid GATE-2025 score is required to apply for Engineering Executive Trainee positions.
